mapper.select: select id, provider, base_url, model_name, api_key_cipher as api_key, timeout_seconds, enabled, supports_vision, role from ai_provider_config order by id asc
select count(*) from ai_provider_config where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into ai_provider_config(provider, base_url, model_name, api_key_cipher, timeout_seconds, enabled, supports_vision, role, created_at, updated_at) values (#{provider}, #{baseUrl}, #{modelName}, #{apiKey}, #{timeoutSeconds}, #{enabled}, #{supportsVision}, #{role}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update ai_provider_config set provider = #{provider}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, model_name = #{modelName}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds}, supports_vision = #{supportsVision}, role = #{role}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}

update ai_provider_config set provider = #{provider}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, model_name = #{modelName}, api_key_cipher = #{apiKey}, timeout_seconds = #{timeoutSeconds}, supports_vision = #{supportsVision}, role = #{role}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, provider, base_url, model_name, api_key_cipher as api_key, timeout_seconds, enabled, supports_vision, role from ai_provider_config where role = 'EMBEDDING' and enabled = 1 order by id desc limit 1
select id, provider, base_url, model_name, api_key_cipher as api_key, timeout_seconds, enabled, supports_vision, role from ai_provider_config where role = 'UTILITY' order by id desc limit 1
select role from ai_provider_config where id = #{id}
mapper.update: update ai_provider_config set enabled = 0 where role <> 'EMBEDDING'
update ai_provider_config set enabled = 1, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, provider, base_url, model_name, api_key_cipher as api_key, timeout_seconds, enabled, supports_vision, role from ai_provider_config where enabled = 1 and role <> 'EMBEDDING' order by id desc limit 1
select id from ai_provider_config order by id desc limit 1
